name: Teleportation
identity: Instantaneously move across distance.
description: Instantaneously move across distance.

cast_modes.effect_description: short hop — teleport up to 10m to seen location.
combat teleport — teleport 25m; gain +1 to next attack roll this turn.
group blink — teleport self + 1 touched ally 25m.

capstone_options.effect_description: scene: teleport up to 15m as Minor action each round; always available.

capstone_options.name: STEPPED PATHS
capstone_options.effect_description: scene: teleport up to 15m as Minor action each round; always available.

once per round in Dodge posture, a hit that would land instead misses (blink-avoid).

name: Blink Step

capstone_options.effect_description: scene: project image + voice + presence to 3 distant known locations simultaneously; all allies in 5m of any projection gain +1 rolls.
capstone_options.signal: I am where I need to be

rider_slots.effect_description: on_Full Parley at far range functions as if at close range (no range penalty).
allies in 5m gain +1 to Parley checks (your presence reinforces their words).
on_Full Assess through projected presence reveals ally's condition at distance.

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: distant Parley also allows you to grant +1 to one ally's action at that location.
distant Parley also allows you to grant +1 to one ally's action at that location.

name: Zone Anchor
identity: Establish area where you're dominant.
description: Establish area where you're dominant.

cast_modes.effect_description: my ground — within 5m of current position, +1 defense for scene.
territorial ground — 5m zone: +1 defense for you; enemies in zone -1 attack.
absolute territory — 10m zone: +2 defense self; +1 defense allies; -1 enemy attacks; enemies save will on entry (TN 11) or *shaken*.

capstone_options.name: SACRED GROUND
capstone_options.effect_description: 15m zone scene: +2 defense self; +2 defense allies; -2 enemy attacks; enemies cannot Reposition out of zone.

capstone_options.name: SACRED GROUND
capstone_options.effect_description: 15m zone scene: +2 defense self; +2 defense allies; -2 enemy attacks; enemies cannot Reposition out of zone.

rider_slots.effect_description: while in your territorial zone, immune to forced movement.
attackers in your zone take 1 counter-damage on successful attacks against you.
on_Full attacks against enemies in your zone deal +1 damage.

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: counter-damage also applies *bleeding* on Crit.
counter-damage also applies *bleeding* on Crit.
counter-damage also applies *bleeding* on Crit.

name: Target Pin
identity: Lock target in place.
description: Lock target in place.

cast_modes.effect_description: stick — target save agi (TN 11) or cannot Reposition next turn.
pin — save agi (TN 12) or *grappled* + cannot Reposition 2r.
mass pin — 5m: all save agi (TN 12) or cannot Reposition this round.

capstone_options.name: CAGE
capstone_options.effect_description: enemy save will (TN 14) or cannot Reposition, teleport, or phase for scene; each round they spend 1 action attempting to break free (TN 12).

capstone_options.name: CAGE
capstone_options.effect_description: enemy save will (TN 14) or cannot Reposition, teleport, or phase for scene; each round they spend 1 action attempting to break free (TN 12).

rider_slots.effect_description: on_Full attacks also apply reposition-disabled 1r; on_Crit target *exposed*.
enemies in 5m Reposition distance reduced by 2m.
on_Full Disrupt also applies reposition-disabled 1r.

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: Full also applies *exposed*; Crit applies *exposed* + reposition-disabled 2r.
Full also applies *exposed*; Crit applies *exposed* + reposition-disabled 2r.
Full also applies *exposed*; Crit applies *exposed* + reposition-disabled 2r.

name: Space Seal
identity: Close an area off from outside.
description: Close an area off from outside.

cast_modes.effect_description: seal doorway — 3m opening sealed 2r: enemies save might (TN 12) to pass.
encircle — 5m area scene: entering or leaving costs a Major action + save (TN 12).
total seal — 10m area scene: absolute barrier; no entry/exit except through you (narrator-adjudicated).

capstone_options.name: SIEGE LINE
capstone_options.effect_description: 20m area scene: complete boundary; entry/exit only via your explicit permission.

capstone_options.name: SIEGE LINE
capstone_options.effect_description: 20m area scene: complete boundary; entry/exit only via your explicit permission.

rider_slots.effect_description: on_Full Disrupt against entering/leaving target applies *stunned* 1r.
enemies attempting to enter or leave 5m around you save will (TN 11) or spend Major action.
detect any breach or crossing attempt of your sealed area.

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: Disrupt also applies *marked* (enemies crossing are tagged for ally attention).
Disrupt also applies *marked* (enemies crossing are tagged for ally attention).
Disrupt also applies *marked* (enemies crossing are tagged for ally attention).

name: Territorial Field
identity: Zone providing benefit to you and allies.
description: Zone providing benefit to you and allies.

cast_modes.effect_description: small boost — 3m area: allies +1 to next attack roll.
rallying ground — 5m zone scene: allies +1 attack, +1 defense.
stronghold — 10m zone: allies +2 attack, +2 defense, 1 phy regen per 3r; enemies -1 to rolls in zone.

capstone_options.name: BASTION
capstone_options.effect_description: 15m zone scene: allies +2 all rolls; 1 phy regen per 2r; enemies save will (TN 12) on entry or *shaken*.

capstone_options.name: BASTION
capstone_options.effect_description: 15m zone scene: allies +2 all rolls; 1 phy regen per 2r; enemies save will (TN 12) on entry or *shaken*.

rider_slots.effect_description: allies in 5m +1 defense.
on_Full Negotiate from within your zone +2.
on_Full attacks from within your zone +1 damage; on_Crit apply *marked*.

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: aura also applies +1 to ally Parley rolls.
aura also applies +1 to ally Parley rolls.
aura also applies +1 to ally Parley rolls.

name: Boundary Definition
identity: Define an edge; things across the edge treat each other as hostile or beyond reach.
description: Define an edge; things across the edge treat each other as hostile or beyond reach.

cast_modes.effect_description: short boundary — 5m line: crossing provokes Attack-of-Opportunity from you (1 free attack).
line of command — 10m line scene: crossings impose save will (TN 12) or cross becomes Major-action-costly.
quarantine circle — 10m circle scene: no projectile or ranged attack can cross; no Gateway effects cross.

capstone_options.name: LAW OF LINES
capstone_options.effect_description: scene: maintain up to 3 boundary lines simultaneously; each applies its own effect.

capstone_options.name: LAW OF LINES
capstone_options.effect_description: scene: maintain up to 3 boundary lines simultaneously; each applies its own effect.

rider_slots.effect_description: enemies crossing into 5m save will (TN 11) or lose 1 Minor action.
on_Full Disrupt when enemy crosses your boundary auto-Full.
on_Full Assess tracks all boundary-crossings in current scene.

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: aura also applies *marked* to any enemy who crosses.
aura also applies *marked* to any enemy who crosses.
aura also applies *marked* to any enemy who crosses.

name: Space Compression
identity: Bring distant things close together / make near things far.
description: Bring distant things close together / make near things far.

cast_modes.effect_description: squish — enemy save agi (TN 11) or treat all distance in area as 2× for them (double movement cost).
compressed zone — 5m area 2r: you and allies move at half cost; enemies at double.
total distortion — 10m zone scene: asymmetric compression; enemies suffer 3× distance cost.

capstone_options.name: FOLDED WORLD
capstone_options.effect_description: 15m zone scene: enemies move at 3× cost; you and allies at 0.5×; all ally ranged attacks +1 damage against zone enemies.

capstone_options.name: FOLDED WORLD
capstone_options.effect_description: 15m zone scene: enemies move at 3× cost; you and allies at 0.5×; all ally ranged attacks +1 damage against zone enemies.

rider_slots.effect_description: on_Full Reposition costs half distance in compressed zones.
enemies in 5m have Reposition distance reduced by 1m.
on_Full ranged attacks at enemies in compressed terrain +1 damage (easier to track).

enhanced_rider_options.effect_description: compressed-zone Reposition also grants +1 to next attack.
compressed-zone Reposition also grants +1 to next attack.
compressed-zone Reposition also grants +1 to next attack.
